title: Nyan Cat Loading
description: Change your loading bar to the Nyan Cat!
body:
# Nyan Cat Loading
![cat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ca118bf5d2d2810b35eeca0b76cc9902e6a1b6e.gif)
### _Change your loading splash screen to the nyan cat!_
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4cd796c9ff9f206021f367b5bd893f5003bc80f.png)

### Features
- Changes the initial loading screen and the resource reload screen's progress bar to the nyan cat.
- Animated nyan cat rainbow trail.
- Supports monochrome background option.
